subject: Fw: New York
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: Emmy Tayler <emtayler@gmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, February 19, 2008 2:45 PM
Subject: New York


Jeffrey,
 
Hope you are very well. I am sooooo excited to be coming to New York and thanks so much for making this happen!
 
My dates are this Thursday February 21st - Saturday March 1st. 
 
Please let me know when it will be a good time for us to meet up. Can't wait.
 
Yippee! 
 
See you soon,
 
Emmy x
